---
title: "フィットネス事業 データ分析レポート"
subtitle: "売上・利益向上に向けた分析と施策提案"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-title: "目次"
    theme: flatly
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "コードを表示"
    self-contained: true
    fig-width: 9
    fig-height: 5
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Load Packages

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(forcats)
library(scales)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(pROC)
library(randomForest)
library(caret)
library(gridExtra)


```

# Data Cleaning

```{r}
# load data
data <- "fitness_gym_data.xlsx"

users <- read_excel(data, sheet = "ユーザーデータ")
training <- read_excel(data, sheet = "トレーニングログ")
body     <- read_excel(data, sheet = "体組成ログ")
purchase <- read_excel(data, sheet = "購入ログ")
products <- read_excel(data, sheet = "商品マスタ")
area_mst <- read_excel(data, sheet = "居住エリアマスタ")


```

```{r}

```
